profile_summary: Leisure traveler (mid budget) prioritizing spa & wellness, quietness.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Harbour, Barcelona ranks #1 for this traveler on spa & wellness (+0.85), quietness (+0.86), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool."

supporting_evidence.quote: The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed.
Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect.

supporting_evidence.quote: Room was wonderfully peaceful and the blackout curtains were perfect.

A proper retreat: yoga in the morning and an excellent spa in the afternoon.
